summary: Completed e2e testing of Styling API, Reseller Settings API, and related frontend pages. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (ResellerSettingsPage, StyleManagementPage) working correctly with all tabs and features.
seed_data_creation: None - APIs auto-create default data when accessed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Styling API at /api/styling/parameters/{product_id} returns parameters with options and surcharges, constructions (Fused, Half Canvas, Full Canvas) with pricing, and base_cmt_price. 2) Reseller Settings API at /api/reseller-settings/{id} returns branding, margins, and theme settings. 3) ResellerSettingsPage at /reseller/settings has 3 working tabs (Branding, Margins, Theme) with company name input, logo/banner preview, margin calculation preview, and theme customization. 4) StyleManagementPage at /admin/styling allows admin to view/select products, add/edit style parameters and options with surcharges. 5) Settings icon in reseller dashboard header correctly navigates to /reseller/settings. 6) StylingPage guard works - shows 'No product selected' when accessed directly without state.

styling_api_get_suits.details: GET /api/styling/parameters/suits returns 10 parameters (Lapel, Chest Pocket, Button Style, etc.) with options and surcharges, 3 constructions (Fused, Half Canvas, Full Canvas), and base_cmt_price of 185

reseller_settings_api_get.details: GET /api/reseller-settings/default returns company_name, logo_url, banner_url, margins (base_product_margin, fabric_margin, style_options_margin), theme (primary_color, secondary_color, etc.), and show_pricing

reseller_settings_api_patch_branding.details: PATCH /api/reseller-settings/{id}/branding updates company name, logo, banner

reseller_settings_page_branding_tab.details: Branding tab shows company name input, logo URL with preview, banner URL with preview, and pricing visibility toggle

reseller_settings_page_margins_tab.details: Margins tab shows base product margin, fabric margin, style options margin inputs with example calculation preview showing customer price

reseller_settings_page_theme_tab.details: Theme tab shows color pickers for primary, secondary, background, button colors with live theme preview

admin_style_management_page.details: Page shows product selector (9 products), Base CMT Price input, Construction Types section with Add Construction button, Style Parameters section with Add Parameter button, and Save Changes button

reseller_dashboard_settings_navigation.details: Settings icon (gear) in reseller dashboard header navigates to /reseller/settings

styling_page_guard.details: StylingPage shows 'No product selected' with 'Go to Dashboard' button when accessed directly without customer/product state
